perks.name: Action Boy
perks.benefit: +1 Action Point per rank.

perks.name: Animal Friend
perks.benefit: Animals will not attack on sight.
perks.notes: Does not apply to deathclaws, centaurs or floaters.

perks.name: Awareness
perks.benefit: Examining a target shows hit points, weapon and ammunition count.

perks.name: Better Criticals
perks.benefit: 20% bonus to critical hit damage.

perks.name: Bonus HtH Attacks
perks.benefit: Hand-to-hand and melee attacks cost 1 AP less to perform.

perks.name: Bonus HtH Damage
perks.benefit: +2 points of damage for hand-to-hand and melee attacks.
perks.notes: Marginal bonus.

perks.name: Bonus Move
perks.benefit: +2 AP per turn that can only be used for movement.

perks.name: Bonus Ranged Damage
perks.benefit: +2 points of damage for ranged weapon attacks.
perks.notes: Marginal bonus.

perks.name: Bonus Rate of Fire
perks.benefit: Ranged weapon attacks cost 1 AP less to perform.

perks.name: Dodger
perks.benefit: +5 Armor Class.

perks.name: Earlier Sequence
perks.benefit: +2 to attack sequence.
perks.notes: Only affects initial combat turn if NPCs initiate combat.

perks.name: Friendly Foe
perks.benefit: In-combat characters on the player's team are highlighted green, instead of red.
perks.notes: Reimplemented in Fallout 2 as a core part of the interface.

perks.name: Heave Ho!
perks.benefit: +2 to Strength when determining range of a thrown weapon.
perks.notes: Does not have any effect unless the player character's strength is less than 4.

perks.name: More Criticals
perks.benefit: +5% chance of critical hits.

perks.name: Night Vision
perks.benefit: 10% reduction in darkness level.
perks.notes: Limited impact due to the underlying chance to hit calculation that prioritizes weapon skills.

perks.name: Rad Resistance
perks.benefit: +10% to Radiation Resistance.
perks.notes: Only floaters deal radiation damage; radiation is not a concern, except for the Glow.

perks.name: Sharpshooter
perks.benefit: +2 to Perception when determining range modifiers.
perks.notes: Limited impact due to the underlying chance to hit calculation that prioritizes weapon skills.

perks.name: Slayer
perks.benefit: All hand-to-hand attacks are critical hits.

perks.name: Snakeater
perks.benefit: +25% to Poison Resistance.
perks.notes: Few creatures can poison the player character and the damage is minimal.

perks.name: Sniper
perks.benefit: Increased chance to score a critical hit with ranged weapons.

perks.name: Toughness
perks.benefit: +10% to damage resistance.

perks.name: Ghost
perks.benefit: +20% to Sneak in dark conditions.

perks.name: Pickpocket
perks.benefit: Size and facing modifiers are ignored when stealing from someone.

perks.name: Silent Death
perks.benefit: When sneaking, hand-to-hand attacks from behind do double damage.

perks.name: Silent Running
perks.benefit: Able to sneak and run at the same time.

perks.name: Explorer
perks.benefit: Higher chance of finding special places and people in random encounters.
perks.notes: Marginal, if any, chance of finding special encounters.

perks.name: Fortune Finder
perks.benefit: Additional money is found during random encounters.
perks.notes: Marginal impact: Money spawns in minor amounts in random encounters.

perks.name: Mysterious Stranger
perks.benefit: Chance for the Mysterious Stranger to appear.
perks.notes: The Stranger is lightly armed and will not appear again if killed.

perks.name: Pathfinder
perks.benefit: 25% reduction in travel time on the world map.
perks.notes: Travel time has no impact on the game, as the initial time limit is generous and the 500 day invasion limit was removed.

perks.name: Ranger
perks.benefit: Chance of hostile random encounters is lowered.
perks.notes: Effectively reduces the amount of experience and loot that can be gained from random encounters.

perks.name: Scout
perks.benefit: Exploration is increased by 1 square in every direction on the world map.
perks.notes: World map vision is not a factor in the game.

perks.name: Scrounger
perks.benefit: Doubles the amount of ammo found in random encounters.
perks.notes: Marginal impact: Ammunition is abundant throughout the game.

perks.name: Survivalist
perks.benefit: +20% bonus to Outdoorsman for survival checks.
perks.notes: Survival checks deal minimal damage and are always absorbed by equipped armor.

perks.name: Educated
perks.benefit: +2 skill points at level up.

perks.name: Master Thief
perks.benefit: +10% to skills: Sneak, Lockpick, Steal, and Traps.

perks.name: Master Trader
perks.benefit: +25% to Barter skill.
perks.notes: Barter bonus is hidden.

perks.name: Medic
perks.benefit: +20% to skills: First Aid and Doctor.

perks.name: Mr. Fixit
perks.benefit: +20% to skills: Repair and Science.

perks.name: Speaker
perks.benefit: +20% to skills: Speech and Barter.

perks.name: Tag!
perks.benefit: Pick an additional Tag Skill.

perks.name: Cult of Personality
perks.benefit: People will always view the player character favorably regardless of reputation or NPC alignment.
perks.notes: It's virtually impossible for characters to react negatively to the player character.

perks.name: Empathy
perks.benefit: Reaction levels are shown when in an in-depth conversation.

perks.name: Presence
perks.benefit: +10% to initial reaction of NPCs.

perks.name: Smooth Talker
perks.benefit: +1 to Intelligence for the purposes of dialogue.
perks.notes: Intelligence has a marginal effect on the success of speech checks, as the game prioritizes the Speech skill; Mentats also provide the same benefit.

perks.name: Faster Healing
perks.benefit: +1 bonus to healing rate.
perks.notes: Stimpaks are readily available and chem addiction has a very limited duration.

perks.name: Flower Child
perks.benefit: 50% less likely to be addicted to chems, and withdrawal time is halved.
perks.notes: Stimpaks are readily available and chem addiction has a very limited duration.

perks.name: Healer
perks.benefit: 2-5 more hit points healed when using First Aid or Doctor skills.

perks.name: Lifegiver
perks.benefit: +4 HP per level.
perks.notes: Marginal benefit due to the level limit.

perks.name: Mental Block
perks.benefit: Resistance to the Master's psychic attacks.
perks.notes: Psychic nullifier is readily available.

perks.name: Mutate!
perks.benefit: Change one of your traits.
perks.notes: If you chose no trait at character creation, you cannot fill the empty slot with this perk.

perks.name: Quick Pockets
perks.benefit: -1 to AP cost to access Inventory.
perks.notes: Cost is 4/3/2/1 AP, depending on ranks taken.

perks.name: Strong Back
perks.benefit: Carry an additional 50 lbs. of equipment.
perks.notes: Party members can carry a lot and party size becomes unlimited.

perks.name: Swift Learner
perks.benefit: +5% bonus whenever XP is earned.
